name: SARATOGA INVESTMENT CORP.
summary: Saratoga Investment Corp. is a specialty finance company providing customized financing solutions to U.S. middle-market businesses (companies with EBITDA of $2M–$50M). It primarily invests in senior and unitranche leveraged loans, mezzanine debt, and equity via direct lending and loan syndication. As of February 28, 2025, it held $1,191.5M in total assets across 48 portfolio companies, with portfolio composition of 88.7% first lien term loans, managed externally by Saratoga Investment Advisors, LLC.
